name: tools_in_order
description: Demonstrates tools_invoked_in_order. Asserts the agent searched (Grep) before reading the matching file (Read). Order is checked as a subsequence of the actual call sequence - extra unrelated calls between them are allowed.

turns.message: Find any file in the current directory that contains the literal string 'belt' in its name field, then read that file and report what it is. Use a search tool first, then read the file.
